assertion_results.evidence: Mentions: "Use pytest-asyncio." and also "Alternative: pytest-anyio with @pytest.mark.anyio"

assertion_results.text: The answer includes `@pytest.mark.asyncio` or an equivalent async test marker
assertion_results.evidence: States: "Mark async tests with pytest.mark.asyncio" and "decorate each async test with @pytest.mark.asyncio"; also mentions alternative marker "@pytest.mark.anyio"
